messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Good morning! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah. Am I speaking with Rahul?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, this is Rahul. Hi.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! I understand you're interested in our JEE coaching program. Which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in 11th standard right now. I was looking at your website and wanted to know more about the courses.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect timing, Rahul! Starting JEE preparation in 11th gives you a great advantage. Are you planning to appear for JEE Main and Advanced in 2026?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, that's the plan. But I'm a bit worried about managing both board exams and JEE prep together.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's a very common concern, and you're smart to think about it early. Our 11th-12th integrated program is specifically designed to balance both. We cover NCERT thoroughly for boards while building the strong foundation needed for JEE. Have you started any preparation yet?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Not really, just school studies mostly. I've been trying to solve some extra problems in physics and maths on my own.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That shows good initiative! Now, to recommend the best program for you, I'd like to understand your budget range. Are your parents supportive of investing in JEE coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, they're supportive, but we need to be careful about the cost. What are your fee structures like?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I completely understand budget is important. Our regular 2-year JEE program is ₹30,000, but we have several scholarship options. Students who score well in our entrance test can get up to 50% scholarship. Would you be interested in taking our scholarship test?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: 50% scholarship sounds good! What does the test cover? And what if I don't score well enough for the scholarship?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: The test covers 11th level Physics, Chemistry, and Maths - mostly NCERT based with some application questions. Even if you don't get 50%, we have scholarships starting from 20% for decent scores. Plus, we offer EMI options to make it more affordable. When would be a good time for you to take the test?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: This weekend would work. But can you tell me more about what exactly I'll get in the course? Like study material, doubt clearing, all that?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! You'll get comprehensive study material for both 11th and 12th, live classes with our expert faculty, recorded lectures you can watch anytime, regular tests and assessments, and 24/7 doubt clearing through our app. We also provide previous years' JEE questions and mock tests. Does this sound like what you're looking for?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, that sounds comprehensive. My parents will definitely want to know about the success rate and faculty background though.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great questions! Our students have achieved a 92% success rate in JEE Main qualification, and our faculty includes IIT graduates with 10+ years of teaching experience. I can arrange a demo class this week so you and your parents can experience our teaching quality firsthand. Would Friday evening work for a demo class?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Friday evening should be fine. Let me confirm with my parents tonight. How do I register for both the demo class and the scholarship test?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll send you a WhatsApp message with links for both registrations right after this call. The demo class is free, and the scholarship test is also free. Can I have your WhatsApp number to send these details?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sure, it's 9876543210. And if I like the demo class and do okay on the scholarship test, when can I start the regular classes?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Excellent! I'll send everything to 9876543210. If you're satisfied after the demo and test, you can start immediately - we have a fresh batch starting next Monday. I'll also include our detailed brochure and fee structure in the message. Is there anything else you'd like to know right now?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I think that covers everything for now. Thanks for explaining everything clearly, Priya. I'll discuss with my parents and register for the demo class today.
